news.summary: New York - In an innovative approach to cancer patient care, a new homeopathic remedy called ENCER has been introduced. This remedy aims to alleviate the fatigue experienced by cancer patients undergoing treatment. Launched in April 2025, ENCER offers a holistic approach by specifically targeting the fatigue that commonly accompanies cancer treatment. This groundbreaking remedy addresses the needs of patients by providing relief and improving their quality of life during this challenging time.
news.headline: ENCER, a homeopathic remedy for cancer treatment-related fatigue (CTRF), is now available nationwide, offering a holistic approach for cancer patients. New York, April 4, 2025.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Jersey City, New Jersey - Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE), a leading Class A multifamily REIT in the Northeast, disclosed plans for its upcoming first quarter 2025 financial results webcast and conference. The event will provide insights into the company's performance and is anticipated to attract a significant audience.
news.headline: Veris Residential hosting first quarter 2025 financial results webcast and conference. NYSE: VRE.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 4, 2025, ATI Corporation (NYSE: ATI) announced their plans for the first quarter 2025 earnings conference call, set to occur on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). The company will release their first quarter 2025 results at 6:30 a.m. CT before the call. This live webcast is a significant event for investors and stakeholders to gain insights into ATI's performance.
news.headline: ATI to present Q1 2025 results via webcast on May 1, 2025 at 7:30am CT. Results out prior to call at 6:30am CT.

news.summary: Prime Roots, a cutting-edge deli brand, is making waves in Toronto with its innovative mycelium-based deli meats, targeting a new wave of consumers. Catering to the increasing demand for plant-based options, Prime Roots has officially debuted in Canada, introducing the country's first mycelium-based deli products. These offerings, which are allergen-free and minimally processed, are proving to be a viable option for foodservice providers seeking operational ease while capitalizing on the plant-based trend. Notably, 35% of Canadians identify as flexitarians, underscoring the significant market potential for Prime Roots' unique offerings.
news.headline: Prime Roots debuts in Canada with mycelium-based deli meats, catering to the growing plant-based demand with allergen-free products. 35% of Canadians are flexitarians.

news.summary: Following the market's biggest losses since 2020, futures plummeted as China retaliated against Trump tariffs, sparking fears of a recession. The Dow Jones Futures took a nosedive in response to this development. Investors are closely monitoring the upcoming jobs report and statements from Powell for further insights.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures plunge after China retaliates against Trump tariffs, raising recession fears. Market saw worst losses since 2020.

news.summary: Dublin, - A report on the Home Energy Management System Market predicts significant growth, estimating it to reach US$14 billion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$3.76 billion in 2024. The market is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.71% from 2025 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include a worldwide focus on energy efficiency, the rising popularity of smart homes and Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, and governmental initiatives promoting sustainable living practices.
news.headline: Home Energy Management Systems market set to reach $14 billion by 2033 from $3.76 billion in 2024, with a 15.71% CAGR.

news.summary: Following the recent decision by the HHS to terminate thousands of employees, Pfizer stock is being scrutinized whether it is a good investment choice. The mass firings have caused uncertainty in the process of approving new drugs. The impact of this move along with the tariffs imposed has raised concerns within the pharmaceutical industry. Investors are now questioning if it is the right time to sell Pfizer stock given these recent events.
news.headline: Pfizer may face challenges as HHS layoffs impact drug approvals, raising concerns over stock performance.

news.summary: Following the resignation of Peter Marks from the FDA, Moderna stock, along with other vaccine manufacturers, is experiencing a downturn. With concerns over the impact of massive job cuts on U.S. health agencies, investors are questioning whether it is time to sell MRNA stock. This news has put pressure on the stock prices of companies in the vaccine sector as uncertainty looms.
news.headline: Moderna stock under pressure as Peter Marks resigns from FDA. Massive job cuts in U.S. health agencies. Is MRNA stock a sell?

news.summary: At 11:25 a.m., Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell will provide insights on the impact of Trump's tariffs on the economic forecast. The focus on Powell's perspective has relegated the jobs report to a secondary role in current coverage. This development was reported live by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell to discuss impact of Trump tariffs at 11:25 a.m. Jobs report overlooked in live coverage.

news.summary: Entourage Health Corp. has successfully completed a plan of arrangement where 1001095275 Ontario Inc., a related party of LiUNA Pension Fund of Central and Eastern Canada, acquired all issued common shares of the company for C$0.005 per share, totaling $1. With an effective date of March 31, 2025, this transaction has been finalized to the satisfaction of Entourage Health Corp. The news was announced on April 04, 2025.
news.headline: Entourage Health Corp. completes acquisition by 1001095275 Ontario Inc. linked with LiUNA, exchanging common shares for C$0.005 each.

news.summary: First Digital has redeemed nearly $26 million in stablecoin withdrawals following allegations of insolvency by Tron founder Justin Sun. FDUSD briefly depegged to $0.87 on April 2 after Sun's claims. Despite this, First Digital honored approximately $25.8 million in FDUSD redemptions. Sun alleged that First Digital transferred over $450 million to a Dubai-based entity, violating regulations. First Digital assured users of solvency and FDUSD being fully backed. Stablecoin depegs pose more systemic risk than a Bitcoin crash, according to CEO Gracy Chen. The $40 billion Terra ecosystem collapsed in May 2022, erasing billions in value.
news.headline: First Digital redeems $26M after FDUSD depeg, dismisses Sun insolvency claims. Source reveals stablecoin redemptions ongoing.

news.summary: An artist with 8 Grammy Awards and a place in the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame shared his journey with ILUMYA®(tildrakizumab-asmn) as part of the "I LUV YA for The Long Haul" initiative. The announcement was made in Princeton, N.J., on April 4, 2025, by Sun Pharma in collaboration with the renowned musician.
news.headline: Art Garfunkel talks about battling psoriasis, partners with Sun Pharma for ILUMYA®, as part of "I LUV YA for The Long Haul" campaign.

news.summary: Alaska Airlines has made history by becoming the first global airline to provide insights from its top training program to assist in creating advanced simulators. Loft, a new player in the fixed-wing sector, is introducing cutting-edge VR technology that is certified by both the FAA and EASA for use in commercial airline training. This collaboration will revolutionize the training sector and is taking place in Seattle.
news.headline: Alaska Airlines invests in Loft Dynamics to develop first Boeing 737 VR simulators for airline training.

news.summary: Honda is working on developing a regenerative fuel cell system, which aims to support life both in space and on Earth. The company plans to conduct tests on its water electrolysis system aboard the International Space Station. The New Space Development Division at American Honda is leading this initiative to promote technology development in the U.S. The system is crucial for sustaining life in extreme conditions, with the potential to benefit space missions and Earth with efficient and sustainable energy.
news.headline: Honda R&D partnered with Sierra Space and Tec-Masters to test regenerative fuel cell on ISS. Seeking tech development in US.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established between a company and organizations nationwide, offering employees complimentary enrollment in Interplay Learning's job-focused certificate programs for skilled trades. This initiative, effective as of April 4, 2025, allows individuals to access immersive training in various trades at no cost. Interplay Learning, recognized as a top provider of hands-on education in skilled trades, revealed this partnership in Austin, Texas.
news.headline: Interplay Learning partners with InStride to offer free job-ready skilled trades training programs to employees nationwide.

news.summary: In a recent development, UCI Health has revamped its consumer web interface by integrating the Abundant Health Acquisition Health Experience Platform. This transformation aims to enhance the user experience for its customers.
news.headline: UCI Health improves web experience with Abundant Health's Acquisition Health platform in Chicago.

news.summary: The CEO of Creative Planning, Peter Mallouk, has outlined three economic scenarios amid escalating global trade wars. In the worst-case scenario, where high U.S. tariffs persist long-term, consumer prices would rise significantly leading to a deep recession and a potential stock market plunge of 30% to 60%. In contrast, a best-case scenario involves successful negotiations within six months resulting in lower interest rates and benefits for U.S. consumers and businesses. A third scenario suggests delays in negotiations leading to unfavorable outcomes. Mallouk's cautionary outlook on the potential impacts of current policy shifts is detailed in a post on X.
news.headline: Analyst warns 60% market crash risk under worst-case tariff scenario, predicts deep recession and price hikes.

news.summary: Regency Centers Corporation, listed as REG on the NASDAQ, is set to release its first quarter 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025, after the market closes. The earnings report and additional information will be available on the Investor Relations page of their website. To discuss these results, the Company will conduct an earnings conference call on April 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Regency Centers to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025 after market close, with earnings call on April 30 at 11am ET.

news.summary: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), based in Geneva, Switzerland, is a company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. The company confirmed that the Trump administration's newly imposed tariffs have no effect on its operations. This is due to an exemption on semiconductors in the current trade policy. SEALSQ benefits from its emphasis on innovation, U.S. development roadmap, and expertise in post-quantum cryptography. Additionally, the company anticipates that post-quantum cryptography will soon be mandated by a U.S. executive order. These factors contribute to SEALSQ's continued success in the market.
news.headline: SEALSQ Corp remains unaffected by new tariffs due to semiconductor exemption, bolstered by innovation, U.S. roadmap, and post-quantum compliance.

news.summary: A recent report titled "Top Five Trends in Loyalty" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's portfolio. The report identifies the top five loyalty trends projected to influence businesses and consumers by 2025. It emphasizes the strategies that can be adopted to boost business profitability, elevate customer interaction, and cultivate brand support. Aimed at existing and prospective stakeholders in the evolving loyalty landscape, the report provides insights into key tactics to achieve these goals.
news.headline: Report outlines top 5 loyalty trends impacting businesses and consumers in 2025, enhancing margins and customer engagement.
Key events this Friday: Payrolls data and remarks from Powell. Stay updated! #economy #jobs #Fed

news.summary: In Huntington Beach, California, Karman has recently acquired Metal Technology Inc., a prominent supplier of ultra-high temperature, refractory alloy systems for strategic missile programs. This acquisition is a significant move for Karman as they expand their offerings in this specialized market. The deal is expected to strengthen Karman's position in the industry and enhance their capabilities. With this acquisition, Karman aims to capitalize on Metal Technology Inc.'s expertise and resources to drive growth and innovation in their strategic missile programs.
news.headline: Karman Space & Defense buys Metal Technology Inc., key supplier of alloy systems for missile programs in Huntington Beach.

news.summary: The digital currency Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is displaying a unique pattern, notes Geoffrey Kendrick of Standard Chartered. In a recent analysis, Kendrick pointed out that Bitcoin is taking on characteristics of high-growth tech stocks like Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) while also serving as a safe haven amid economic uncertainties. Kendrick suggested that Bitcoin is excelling as a tech investment during market highs and as a hedge during turbulent economic conditions. This dual nature of Bitcoin as a tech asset and a financial hedge is increasingly evident in recent trading trends. For more details, visit the article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin is termed "the best of tech" as it mirrors tech stock growth and acts as a hedge against financial uncertainty.

news.summary: In Valencia, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) revealed the launch of Iris, a townhome community within Los Angeles County’s Valencia master plan. The renowned U.S. homebuilder offers modern homes tailored to current lifestyles, including kitchens opening into spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, plentiful storage, sizeable front patios, and side yards. Iris is part of a premier master plan offering 0.0017-acre outdoor space for residents. KB Home is known for its commitment to quality and innovation, ensuring the new homes meet the evolving needs of buyers.
news.headline: KB Home opens new townhome community "Iris" in Valencia, Los Angeles County master plan. Modern designs with great rooms, walk-in closets, and private patios. #KBHome #NewCommunity.

news.summary: Located in Perris, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled its latest community, Rockridge, catering to current living trends. The neighborhood in Riverside County offers one- and two-story homes with features such as contemporary kitchens, spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. The grand opening introduces modern living options to the area, as KB Home solidifies its position as one of the leading homebuilders in the U.S.
news.headline: KB Home opens new community "Rockridge" in Perris, CA with modern homes designed for today's living.

news.summary: Las Vegas - Two dozen global companies will present innovative solutions for advanced broadcasting at the 2025 NAB Show's main location for ATSC 3.0 standards, situated at booth W3056 in the West Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center. The event will run from Sunday, April 6, to Wednesday afternoon, April 9. ATSC, the Broadcast Standards Association, boasts nearly 60 member companies participating in this year's NAB Show.
news.headline: Next-gen broadcasting showcased by 24 global firms at NAB Show. ATSC 3.0 standards on display at booth W3056. Over 60 ATSC member companies participating.

news.summary: Shares of Shell PLC (NYSE:SHEL) are experiencing a decline in premarket trading on Friday following an announcement that its subsidiary, Shell Midstream Operating LLC, has agreed to sell its 16.125% stake in Colonial Enterprises, Inc. for $1.45 billion to Colossus AcquireCo LLC, a subsidiary of Brookfield Infrastructure Partners LP (NYSE:BIP). Along with Shell, the other co-owners of Colonial Enterprises have also agreed to sell their shares to Brookfield, resulting in the acquisition of 100% of the company for $9 billion. This deal, valued at 9 times EBITDA, includes the acquisition of Colonial Pipeline.
news.headline: Shell sold its 16.125% stake in Colonial Pipeline to Brookfield for $1.45B. Brookfield acquiring 100% stake for $9B.

news.summary: A plastic surgeon in Asheville, North Carolina, was recently honored for his remarkable achievements and for offering high-quality plastic surgery services to the local community and beyond. The recognition was given on April 4, 2025, showcasing his outstanding contributions to the field. Known for his exceptional skill and commitment to patient well-being, this surgeon has made a significant impact on the field of plastic surgery.
news.headline: Dr. Eric Halvorson voted Best of Asheville for Cosmetic Surgery, recognized for exceptional skill and patient care.
China probes Dupont China on antitrust violation

news.summary: In a Phase 3b study, TREMFYA® showed significant effectiveness in patients with active psoriatic arthritis prone to structural damage, with key results showing clinically meaningful improvements at Week 24. The findings indicate a statistically significant efficacy in various areas, solidifying TREMFYA®'s position as a preferred initial treatment option.
news.headline: TREMFYA® reduces signs and symptoms of psoriatic arthritis, shows significant efficacy in Phase 3b study with risk patients.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in South San Francisco, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed the granting of awards under the Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Inducement Plan. The plan was approved by the Compensation Committee of Rigel's Board of Directors. Rigel, listed as Nasdaq: RIGL, did not disclose the specific number of awards or the monetary value.
news.headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has granted awards under NASDAQ Rule 5635(c)(4) inducement Plan.

news.summary: Cintas Corporation revealed that Mike Hansen, CFO, will retire and move into the position of Assistant to the CEO on May 31, 2025. Following his transition, he will focus on aiding his successor and participating in strategic initiatives and special projects. Scott Garula, the current President of Cintas' Rental Division, will take over as the new Executive Vice President & CFO. Cintas Corporation is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CTAS.
news.headline: Cintas Corporation CFO Mike Hansen to retire and transition to new role. Scott Garula to succeed him. May 31, 2025 effective.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Bosch home appliances and Lavazza are teaming up to bring the best in coffee to homes. This new partnership aims to provide barista-quality coffee with just the touch of a button. Bosch, known for its precision engineering, and Lavazza, a globally recognized premium coffee brand, are offering special deals and promotions. This collaboration promises an exciting experience for coffee enthusiasts with the convenience of enjoying high-quality coffee in their own homes. Stay tuned for more details on this partnership that is set to revolutionize home coffee brewing.
news.headline: Bosch and Lavazza team up for barista-quality coffee at home. Aim to provide exclusive offers and promotions to customers.

news.summary: Dublin - The market for Military Robots is anticipated to grow significantly, reaching USD 26.49 billion by 2029 from USD 18.20 billion in 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8%. The report encompasses various types such as Wheeled, Tracked, Legged, USV, AUV, ROV, Small UAV, Tactical UAV, and Strategic UAV, along with operational technology, propulsion, application, system, range, end-use, and regions. This data has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection.
news.headline: Global military robots market projected to reach $26.49 billion by 2029, from $18.20 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 7.8%. Key technologies analyzed include LiDAR, navigation, sensor payloads, and exoskeletons.

news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, Sangoma Technologies Corporation (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG) has revealed its participation in the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 with MicroCapClub on April 23, 2025, at 8:00 AM PDT. The company, offering businesses on-premises, cloud-based, or hybrid Communications as a Service solutions, will have their Chief Executive Officer, Charles Salameh, leading the presentation and Q&A session.
news.headline: Sangoma to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase in Las Vegas on Apr 23-24, 2025. CEO Charles Salameh to host presentation.

news.summary: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) has announced an expansion of its IMAX Enhanced program called Stream it in IMAX Enhanced in Las Vegas. This new offering is tailored to address the increasing interest in premium live event streaming at home. By leveraging top-notch technical skills and exclusive streaming technologies, IMAX aims to boost image and sound quality at the origin, continuously monitor standards for top-notch viewing, and enhance the overall in-home live programming experience.
news.headline: IMAX expands IMAX Enhanced program for premium live event viewing in the home; combines expertise and tech for quality.
Question arises: why the sudden surge in desire to become banks?.com

news.summary: A new education technology company named WorldQuant Learning, created by Igor Tulchinsky, was established in New York. This company focuses on enhancing the capacity of institutions to provide top-notch online education on a large scale to meet the increasing global need for data science and technology experts. WorldQuant Learning aims to expedite access to knowledge and abilities for learners of all types, as stated by John Endrud, the CEO of WorldQuant Learning. Their platform, WorldQuant Labs, aims to address the rising requirement for technical expertise.
news.headline: WorldQuant Learning launched to meet demand for data science talent, aims to provide online education at scale.
